title: calamus axillaris
intro: Calamus axillaris, also known as Acorus calamus, is a type of plant native to Asia and Europe, belonging to the Acorus genus of flowering plants. The plant's rhizome is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of calamus axillaris include relieving digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of calamus axillaris typically involve drying and processing the rhizome to create teas, tinctures, and essential oils for medicinal use.
